name: blue-carbon-mrv
description: Blue Carbon MRV Full Platform — Frontend, Backend, Blockchain, Database

scripts.install:all: npm install && cd backend && npm install
scripts.frontend:both: npm run frontend:admin & npm run frontend:mobile
scripts.dev: npm run backend:dev & npm run frontend:admin & npm run frontend:mobile
scripts.blockchain:deploy: cd blockchain && npx hardhat run scripts/deploy.js --network localhost
